/usr/bin/ar qc libbhrt_core.a CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/triangulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/ts_color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/diagram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/invariants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/search_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/bhrt_format.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/bhrt_c_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/tri_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/regina_bridge.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/home/nub-04/Math_rs/bhrt_trisect/cuda/score_moves.cu.o" "CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/home/nub-04/Math_rs/bhrt_trisect/cuda/candidate_pack.cu.o" "CMakeFiles/bhrt_core.dir/home/nub-04/Math_rs/bhrt_trisect/cuda/ts_scan.cu.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libbhrt_core.a
